name: Volcano Engine
description: ByteDances enterprise cloud (火山引擎) offering GPU compute, Doubao LLM, VikingDB vector DB, Coze, Trae AI IDE and other developer tools.

seo.title: Volcano Engine — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Volcano Engine: ByteDances enterprise cloud (火山引擎) offering GPU compute, Doubao LLM, VikingDB vector DB, Coze, Trae AI IDE and other developer tools.

when_to_use: ByteDance's GPU compute and Doubao LLM for enterprise AI
VikingDB vector database for RAG and search applications
Coze AI agent platform for building enterprise chatbots
TikTok-proven video and CDN infrastructure as enterprise cloud
AI-native cloud services from ByteDance for Chinese enterprises

pros: Backed by ByteDance, huge internal scale
Doubao LLM and VikingDB vector database included
Trae IDE and Coze agent platform integrated
Aggressive pricing on GPU and LLM inference
review.verdict: Serious AI cloud inside China with cheap GPUs and LLMs, but Western teams will hit real geopolitical friction.
review.best_for: China-based teams building on Doubao, VikingDB, or TikTok-adjacent products
review.not_for: Western enterprises with compliance or data-residency constraints
